title: ARDY: Autoregressive Diffusion with Hybrid Representation for Interactive Human Motion Generation
innovation_summary: ARDY: Autoregressive Diffusion with Hybrid Representation for Interactive Human Motion Generation: In this work, we introduce ARDY, a streaming generation framework that bridges this gap by enabling high-fidelity motion generation controllable via online text prompts and flexible.
